Regime definitions for winner-per-regime.question: What cache fraction(s) define the 'small cache' regime?
What alpha(s) define the 'high skew' regime?
How should 'mixed sizes' regime be defined?
Regime definitions for winner-per-regime.answer: Byte-MRC on Court only (empirical — Court is the heavy-tailed workload per Phase 3 workload_stats; Congress is 'uniform sizes' by contrast; avoids arbitrary threshold)

Regime definitions for winner-per-regime.question: How should 'OHW regime' be defined?
Regime definitions for winner-per-regime.answer: Use empirical OHW ratios from workload_stats.json (whichever workload has higher OHW = high-OHW regime; the other = low-OHW)
